Closing keyword — REQUIRED for each issue this PR resolves.
GitHub auto-closes only from a keyword in the PR body (or a commit) — never from the
title or a plain #NN mention — and the keyword must be repeated per issue:
    Closes #12, closes #13   ✅ closes both
    Closes #12, #13          ❌ closes only #12
